generated_oml:
instance ThermalIncubator : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Thermal incubator system comprising styrofoam insulated container (0.03 m³ air volume), heatbed (214×214×3 mm), fan (0.02 m³/s airflow), three DS18S20 temperature sensors, Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller, PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers, and power supply for temperature regulation"
    base:contains StyrofoamContainer, RaspberryPi4, PCB, Heatbed, Fan, DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3, PowerSupplySensor
]

instance StyrofoamContainer : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Styrofoam insulated container with 0.03 m³ air volume"
]

instance RaspberryPi4 : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Raspberry Pi 4 Model B controller"
]

instance PCB : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "PCB with MOSFETs and optocouplers for actuator control"
]

instance Heatbed : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Heatbed with dimensions 214×214×3 mm controlled via MOSFETs for 4A current"
]

instance Fan : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Fan with airflow 0.02 m³/s operating at 12V/24V"
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor1 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with measuring range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor2 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with measuring range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance DS18S20TemperatureSensor3 : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "DS18S20 High-Precision 1-Wire Digital Thermometer with measuring range -55°C to +125°C, ±0.5°C accuracy from -10°C to +85°C, unique 64-bit serial code"
    DTDFVocab:producedData TemperatureDataStream
]

instance PowerSupplySensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Power supply measurement sensor for current and voltage"
    DTDFVocab:producedData PowerSupplyDataStream
]

instance TemperatureDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom DS18S20TemperatureSensor1, DS18S20TemperatureSensor2, DS18S20TemperatureSensor3
]

instance PowerSupplyDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom PowerSupplySensor
]

instance CalibrationDataSource : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Source of calibration data from experiments"
]

instance CalibrationDataStream : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CalibrationDataSource
]

instance TemperatureData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Temperature data from sensors transmitted via RabbitMQ message broker"
    DTDFVocab:fromData TemperatureDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance PowerSupplyData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Power supply measurements data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData PowerSupplyDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance CalibrationData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Calibration data from experiments used for parameter optimization"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CalibrationDataStream
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance RabbitMQMessageBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ message broker for real-time data transmission between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance LowLevelDriver : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Low-level driver software reading sensor data and publishing to RabbitMQ server on Raspberry Pi"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeMonitoringService
]

instance PythonSciPy : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python with SciPy for non-linear least squares calibration optimization"
    DTDFVocab:enables ParameterCalibrationService
]

instance OneWireBus : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "1-Wire bus communication protocol for temperature sensor connectivity"
    DTDFVocab:enables LowLevelDriver
]

instance ModelA : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simplified energy balance model with two parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance ModelB : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Detailed energy flow model with four parameters for temperature prediction"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TemperaturePredictionService
]

instance TemperaturePredictionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for temperature prediction using calibrated simulation models (Model A and B)"
    DTDFVocab:provides TemperaturePrediction
]

instance RealTimeMonitoringService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time monitoring of safety and optimal performance using temperature predictions"
    DTDFVocab:provides SafetyMonitoring, OptimalPerformanceMonitoring, ControlDecision
]

instance ParameterCalibrationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for parameter calibration via non-linear least squares optimization using Scipy"
    DTDFVocab:provides CalibrationResult
]

instance TemperaturePrediction : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Predicted temperature values from simulation models"
]

instance SafetyMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of temperature for safety (e.g., preventing overheating)"
]

instance OptimalPerformanceMonitoring : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Monitoring of temperature for optimal performance (e.g., maintaining setpoint)"
]

instance CalibrationResult : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Calibrated parameters from non-linear least squares optimization"
]

instance ControlDecision : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Control decisions based on bang-bang logic with upper/lower limits for heatbed and fan"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Control commands (e.g., heatbed on/off, fan activation) sent from controller to low-level driver via RabbitMQ, which executes actuation through MOSFETs and GPIO."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time control with sensor updates and actuation within seconds; fan airflow cycles air in 2 seconds, heatbed response time under 2 seconds."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Orchestration of RabbitMQ server, low-level driver, controller, and simulation models communicating via message passing; data flow from sensors → low-level driver → RabbitMQ → controller/models."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As operated phase; models integrated into DT for the deployed physical incubator system."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation via experimental testing (e.g., temperature uniformity checks), calibration using least squares minimization of residual error; Model B better predicts thermal inertia."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "RabbitMQ for inter-component communication, 1-Wire bus for sensors, GPIO for actuator control."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All components hosted on Raspberry Pi 4 Model B; RabbitMQ server runs on-device."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "Safe protocol in low-level driver to maintain device safety; no detailed cybersecurity measures specified."
]
